description:
Updates the configuration

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyConfigurationEdit

Creates a new journey instance. The request must contain journey schema id that is currently published and in effect.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyCreate

Cancels a currently in progress journey instance and rejects the associated entity draft.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyCancel

Cancels all currently in progress journey instance and rejects the associated entity draft.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyCancel

• Completes a currently in progress task.
  • If the task is not the last one in given process, the next task will be started, otherwise next process will be started.
  • If all the processes within stage finished, the next stage will be started. If it's the last stage, the Journey Instance will complete.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyEdit

Completes review outcome task.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyEdit

Reassigns task to new team.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: JourneyReassignTask, JourneyReassignTaskOwnerOnly, JourneyReassignOwnerNoTaskAccess

Reassigns tasks to new teams.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: JourneyReassignTask, JourneyReassignTaskOwnerOnly, JourneyReassignOwnerNoTaskAccess

Reset journey task. Warning: If the Task being reset belongs to parallel process (or stage), any changes made, may impact already closed tasks in this process (or stage)

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneyReopenTask

• Creates a new journey launch controls definition.

• Creates a new journey Schedule with a first draft version.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerEdit

• Creates a new version of an existing journey Schedule.
  • Assigns the next available version number.
  • The new version initializes with the provided data, has the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerEdit

summary: Delete journey Schedule and all its versions
description:
Deletes an existing journey Schedule and all its versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerDelete

Updates an existing journey Schedule version. Only draft and rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerEdit

• Deletes the selected version of an existing journey Schedule.
  • If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as deleted and become unavailable.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerDelete

• Clones the selected version of an existing journey Schedule and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned data group version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: JourneySchedulerEdit
